title: arachnorchis cruscula
intro: Arachnorchis cruscula, also known as the small shield orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It is a terrestrial orchid that grows in the wild, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Arachnorchis cruscula can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in topical applications, to harness its medicinal benefits.
